Praiseworthy is the term used to refer to an action being ethically wanted. It is not a term implying the need for reward

Is antonym is [[blameworthy]] which refers to an action being ethically unwanted, which likewise does not imply the need for punishment.

== Categories ==
*[[obligations]] (fard)
*[[Supererogations]] (''mustahabb)''
[[Category:Ethics]]
[[sn:Praiseworthy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
